title: Heirs of 'odious' 167-year-old Supreme Court ruling see modern parallels
description: Descendants of Dred Scott and Chief Justice Roger Taney spoke about reconciliation at a church in the shadow of the Supreme Court last week as the high court wrestled with race and who can be an American.

title: Trump's NATO pressure campaign continues as summit begins
description: President Trump's arrival in Ankara kicks off another potentially tense meeting for NATO.

title: Gov. Sherrill ran on freezing electricity rates. Can she bring relief to New Jersey?
description: Gov. Mikie Sherrill, a Democrat, campaigned on freezing electricity rates in New Jersey. Six months into her term, can her campaign promises bring relief to the high cost of power in the Garden State?

title: Top Democrats pull Graham Platner endorsements, call on him to end Maine Senate campaign
description: The Democrat, who has withstood other scandals since launching his challenge to Sen. Susan Collins (R), is accused of sexual assault by a woman he previously dated.

title: China test-fires long-range missile into Pacific, rattling U.S. allies
description: The unprecedented test of a nuclear-capable submarine-launched missile highlights Beijing’s growing force in the region.

title: Supreme Court lets Texas restrict minors' access to app stores for the time being
description: Texas' App Store Accountability Act requires minors to have their parents' permission to download most apps. The Supreme Court says the law can go into effect as lawsuits continue in lower courts.

title: Graham Platner faces growing calls to withdraw following allegation of sexual assault
description: The Democratic candidate for Senate in Maine said he was assessing next steps after allegations of sexual assault were reported on Monday by Politico. Platner denied them as "categorically untrue."

title: After America’s 250th, Trump will test how far he can push NATO allies
description: As NATO leaders gather in Turkey, they are preparing for another summit shaped as much by managing President Donald Trump as by the alliance's security agenda.

title: Man sues DHS after agents tracked him down for sending a scathing email to ICE
description: Federal agents tried to track David Streever to his home and hotel, and left him a warning notice that a critical email he sent the former head of ICE may have been illegal. Now he's suing.

title: Under Trump, spouses of U.S. citizens face policy changes in the immigration system
description: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers.

title: Democrats and Republicans pitch different visions of America on July 4th
description: Both parties used the Fourth of July holiday to pitch their vision for the country.

title: How Trump marked the 250th anniversary of independence
description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks to Sarah Isgur, senior editor at The Dispatch, about President Trump's celebration of the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence.

title: Former Marine says military veterans running for office advance bipartisan politics
description: A former Marine says in a new book that military veterans running for office can bring Washington the courage to work across party lines.
